title: Hardware-Aware TLS Identity Binding Profile: Draft v0.1.0
description: A draft security profile for agent-to-agent and other application protocols using TLS 1.3, post-handshake platform attestation, session binding, Manager-signed Identity Grants, Agent Session Binding Statements, and deterministic expected-versus-observed policy checks. AGTP is treated as one reference target, not as the owner of the profile.
